dialogues.speaker: Station Medic
lines: Welcome to the Bloomrail Station rest area.
Trains are delayed, but you can rest your JoyMon here.

dialogues.speaker: Station Conductor
lines: The train is ready, but the platform is blocked due to the field problems to the east.
We cannot depart until the flower pollen settles.

dialogues.speaker: Station Conductor
lines: Thank you! You cleared the pollen fields and defeated the trainers.
The platform is now open. All aboard!
But be careful... there is a strange creature blocking the train controls inside!

dialogues.speaker: Station Conductor
lines: You defeated the monster in the engine room!
The train service has officially resumed.
Step onto the train at column 11 of the platform to depart for the next region!

dialogues.speaker: Waiting Passenger
lines: I was trying to travel to the next town, but the conductor won't let anyone onto the platform.

dialogues.speaker: Station Regular
lines: I hear Pollibun and Railmouse are nesting in the Flowerline Fields.
They are usually peaceful, but something has agitated them.

dialogues.speaker: Tourist
lines: This station is famous for its floral layout, but the pollen today is making my staticrow sneeze!

dialogues.speaker: Flower Vendor
lines: If you are headed to the fields, watch out for the pollen maze.
It is easy to lose your way.
